Hello, I'm Mourya Sai Narra
MSc Data Science Student

Analytically driven MSc Big Data & Data Science student with hands-on experience in Python, SQL and data visualisation. I turn complex datasets into clear, actionable insights — with a keen interest in health, wellbeing and behaviour-change analytics — and communicate findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.
